title: Explicit included-host counts per tier (Pro=1 Max=3)
files: Add includedHosts per tier so multi-node clusters don't hit surprise overage; surface on landing + in-app billing card. Kills the #1 pricing sticker-shock risk.

title: Replica = 0.5 billable host
files: Bill a detected replica as 0.5 host (copy pganalyze). Requires replica detection from system.replicas.

title: BYOK on Free/Pro for the AI advisor
files: Allow user-supplied model API key; skip included-credit metering when BYOK active. Expands funnel + protects margin. Measure BYOK vs included-credit conversion.

title: $199 Fleet mid-anchor tier (experiment)
files: Optional tier for 5-10 host clusters (5 hosts included). Ship behind experiment flag; A/B vs Max + overage.

title: Annual billing (~2 months free) end-to-end
files: Wire the annual SKU end-to-end after Plan 17 e2e tests pass (yearly = 10x monthly).

title: SEO: error-page cluster (4 pages)
files: too-many-parts, MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, memory limit total exceeded, merges-slower-than-inserts. Real diagnostic SQL + expected output + one-click demo. Lowest difficulty, highest intent.

title: SEO: flagship system.query_log slow-query how-to
files: The SEO page IS the product workflow. Exact query_duration_ms>5000 query + GIF of chmonitor surfacing it.

title: SEO: optimization hub (6 interlinked pages + pillar)
files: Partition keys, granularity, PREWHERE vs WHERE, projections vs MVs, skip indices, external GROUP BY. Interlinked hub + pillar page.

title: SEO: near-ICP comparison pages
files: ClickHouse vs TimescaleDB, vs Postgres (analytics), vs Druid/Pinot only.

title: SEO: OG images + meta audit + Lighthouse pass
files: Extend Plans 69/70 across the new pages.

title: Product-analytics funnel + founder dashboard
files: Track install -> connect -> first advisor rec -> paywall hit -> upgrade. Baseline stars/installs/followers. Do first. Extends Plan 62.

title: 5-min-of-ClickHouse blog engine (first 8 posts)
files: 8 cornerstone posts, each -> 5-min video + X thread + Slack snippet. Extends Plan 67.

title: MCP registry listings + one-command install
files: List on official MCP Registry, PulseMCP, cursor.directory, Smithery/Glama. Add claude mcp add + Cursor snippet to README.

title: README-as-landing-page + awesome-clickhouse PR
files: Hero GIF of advisor, quickstart, before/after benchmark. PR onto awesome-clickhouse; on-ramp from duyet/clickhouse-monitoring.

title: Zero-signup local diagnostics CLI
files: CLI runs system.query_log/system.parts diagnostics locally with no account. Show HN artifact.
